title: Non-UTF-8 keyfile path silently becomes empty string in relay connector
description: In daemon/src/main.rs line 222, keyfile_path.to_str().unwrap_or("") passes an empty string to start_relay_connector() if the data directory path contains non-UTF-8 bytes. The relay connector then fails with an I/O error like 'No such file or directory' on path '' rather than a clear diagnostic about the invalid keyfile path. Fix: use .to_str().context('keyfile path contains non-UTF-8 characters')? to propagate a clear error instead of silently substituting empty string.
